headline: DA Davidson Cuts PT on Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) to $20 From $21 – Here’s Why
summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) is one of the best undervalued stocks under $50 to invest in now.
